items.title: Amgen Agrees to Buy Dark Blue Therapeutics in Up to $840 Million Deal
items.description: The acquisition adds a preclinical protein degrader program targeting acute myeloid leukemia to Amgen's oncology pipeline.

items.title: The Dogs of the Dow may offer a measure of stability in equities: Sanctuary Wealth's Bartels
items.description: CNBC's "Power Lunch" team discusses where to find opportunities in the Dow and more with Mary Ann Bartels of Sanctuary Wealth.

items.title: Dark Blue Therapeutics acquired by Amgen for up to $840 million
items.description: Dark Blue Therapeutics ("Dark Blue"), a discovery and development biotech company pioneering the next generation of precision oncology medicines, has been acquired by Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN).

items.title: Amazon.com Inc., UnitedHealth share gains contribute to Dow's nearly 500-point rally
items.description: Amazon.com Inc., UnitedHealth share gains contribute to Dow's nearly 500-point rally

items.title: AMGEN ACQUIRES DARK BLUE THERAPEUTICS, BOLSTERING ONCOLOGY PIPELINE
items.description: Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN) today announced its acquisition of Dark Blue Therapeutics Ltd., a privately held biotechnology company based in the United Kingdom advancing first-in-class, small molecule-targeted protein degraders for oncology, in a transaction valued at up to $840 million.
